zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Cogan於1243年9月8日出生在英國戴文時，他的父親Sir John de Cogan of Bampton54歲，母親Mary or Margery Prendergast21歲。他至少有3個兒子。他去世於1302年4月26日在愛爾蘭庫迪 利默里克阿爾達賀享年58歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭戴文巴普頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John de Cogan于1243年9月8日出生在英国戴文时，他的父亲Sir John de Cogan of Bampton54岁，母亲Mary or Margery Prendergast21岁。他至少有3个儿子。他去世于1302年4月26日在爱尔兰庫迪 利默里克阿爾達賀享年58岁，埋葬在英国英格兰戴文巴普頓。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Cogan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of Jewish (from Ukraine) Kogan, from the Russian pronunciation of Cohen .

Irish and Welsh (of Norman origin): habitational name from Cogan near Cardiff, which may have been named with a Welsh word meaning ‘bowl, depression’. In 1166 Milo de Cogan, held two fees near Penarth (Glamorganshire) of William earl of Gloucester. Members of this Norman family probably account for the name's appearance in 13th-century Berwickshire. By this time the family was also present in Ireland, associated with counties Limerick and Cork. It may have been the Irish branch that later brought the name to southwest Scotland.

variants.name: Cogen
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Dorith.  German Erwin.

variants.name: Cohen
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Hyman, Meyer, Isadore, Emanuel, Moshe, Shlomo, Myer, Avi, Yehuda, Chaim.
Jewish: from Hebrew kohen ‘priest’. Priests are traditionally regarded as members of a hereditary caste descended from Aaron, brother of Moses. See also Kaplan .
Irish (Galway and Sligo): variant of   Coyne  .

variants.name: Coggins
meanings: English: variant of Cogan , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Coggan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Brigid, Conal, Seamus.  Jewish Hyman.
Americanized form of Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic) Kogan, from the Russian pronunciation of Cohen .

nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When John de Cogan was born on 8 September 1243, in Devon, England, his father, Sir John de Cogan of Bampton, was 54 and his mother, Mary or Margery Prendergast, was 21. He had at least 3 sons. He died on 26 April 1302, in Ardach, County Limerick, Ireland, at the age of 58, and was buried in Bampton, Devon, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de Cogan est né le 8 septembre 1243, à Devon, Angleterre, son père, Sir John de Cogan of Bampton, avait 54 ans et sa mère, Mary or Margery Prendergast, avait 21 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé le 26 avril 1302, à Ardach, County Limerick, Irlande, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterré à Bampton, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als John de Cogan am 8. September 1243 in Devon, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John de Cogan of Bampton 54 und seine Mutter Mary or Margery Prendergast 21. Er hatte mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb am 26. April 1302 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Ardach, County Limerick, Irland und wurde in Bampton, Devon, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John de Cogan è nato il il 8 settembre 1243 nel Devon, England, il suo padre, Sir John de Cogan of Bampton, aveva 54 anni e il suo madre, Mary or Margery Prendergast, aveva 21 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli. Morì il 26 aprile 1302, nel Ardach, County Limerick, Irlanda, all'età di 58 anni, e fu sepolto a Bampton, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: John de Coganが1243年9月8日にイギリスデボンで生まれた時，父Sir John de Cogan of Bamptonは54歳，母Mary or Margery Prendergastは21歳であった。彼は少なくとも3人の息子をもうけた。彼は1302年4月26日にアイルランドコウントイ リメリックアルダチで58歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスデボンバンプトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John de Cogan(이)가 1243년 9월 8일 영국 데폰에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John de Cogan of Bampton(은)는 54세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary or Margery Prendergast(은)는 21세였다. 그는 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1302년 4월 26일 아일랜드 카운티 라임릭 아다치에서 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 바프턴에 묻혔다.

mn.8 September 1243–26 April 1302: 1243 оны Есдүгээр сарын 8–1302 оны Дөрөвдүгээр сарын 26

pt.8 September 1243–26 April 1302: 8 de setembro de 1243–26 de abril de 1302
pt.lifeSummary: Quando John de Cogan nasceu em 8 de setembro de 1243, em Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John de Cogan of Bampton, tinha 54 anos e sua mãe, Mary or Margery Prendergast, tinha 21 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu em 26 de abril de 1302, em Ardach, County Limerick, Irlanda, com 58 anos, e foi sepultado em Bampton, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Cogan родился 8 сентября 1243 г. в местности девон, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John de Cogan of Bampton было 54 года, а матери, которую звали Mary or Margery Prendergast, 21. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер 26 апреля 1302 г. в местности ардач, коунти лимирикк, Ирландия в возрасте 58 лет и был похоронен в местности бамптон, девон, Англия, Великобритания.

es.8 September 1243–26 April 1302: 8 de septiembre de 1243–26 de abril de 1302
es.lifeSummary: Cuando John de Cogan nació el 8 de septiembre de 1243, en Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John de Cogan of Bampton, tenía 54 años y su mamá, Mary or Margery Prendergast, tenía 21 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió el 26 de abril de 1302, en Ardach, County Limerick, Irlanda, a la edad de 58 años, y fue sepultado en Bampton, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
